mano_cua.result_summary: 多次点击 Render a toast 按钮后，toast 通知完全不渲染/不可见。按钮有点击响应但无 toast 弹出，无法测试展开（expand）功能。页面布局异常，内容仅占右侧约30%区域。toast 渲染功能存在明显 bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After multiple button clicks, toasts are completely invisible/not rendering. The button exists and is clickable but no toast notifications appear. This is a functional bug - the expand feature cannot be tested because toast rendering itself is broken.
